steps.t: The morroval-camp is at Tith-maudhûl, east of the Fanged Pit camp. Bési asked you to free the infected Orcs from their cages and defeat any merrevail …
Bési is at the Fanged Pit camp west of Tith-maudhûl. Bési will be pleased to know that you freed the infected Orcs from the cages and killed any merre…
